prompts:
the backend received query request to search in dev mode (port 3301) and sent messages to queue, the dev mode standalone worker did not read it from the correct queue and process them. here is the backend console log, make a plan to fix this : Connecting to CloudAMQP LavinMQ...
Queue 'grid-processing' declared
Queue 'point-processing' declared
